response.step_by_step_log: 1. Audited the audio throughout the entire video to detect any vocal performances. 2. Confirmed that all background music is purely instrumental BGM for the game/stream. 3. No vocal music was detected, therefore no lyrics search was performed.
response.global_summary: A video of a VTuber (Gawr Gura) navigating a Minecraft server, browsing shop menus, and participating in a High & Low card game mini-game. The background audio consists solely of instrumental background music.

scenes.description: Continuous Minecraft gameplay. The player explores a custom server environment, visits shops to sell/buy items, and interacts with a card game mini-game. The background audio consists entirely of instrumental BGM.
